model_name: HYM HAMT2.0 R13 DRIVE ONLY (turn76 + can.zip validated)
notes: Drive-channel only model pack validated from can.zip real log (2026-04-03). Built for turn76 structure. Rules are applied only to drive-side IDs actually observed in can.zip to avoid false 미수신 on unobserved command IDs. Messages include full drive-sheet IDs plus observed extra status IDs 0x702/0x703/0x704/0x705/0x732. Signal alarms use only turn76-supported fields (range/flag/reserved/monitor_only). Frame-to-frame jump or cross-signal consistency rules are documented in descriptions but require evaluator support in code to become active alarms.
